message:
chore(beads): Close Phase 0 epic - Single-Thread Deterministic Kernel complete

All Phase 0 work complete:
- 10 sub-beads closed (scaffolding through verification)
- 2145+ library tests passing
- 23 E2E tests covering all 10 canonical scenarios
- All 6 non-negotiable invariants verified by oracles
- Benchmark suite in place

Phase 1 (Parallel Scheduler and Region Heap) is now unblocked.
